title: Ruby report performs quadratic nested iteration

files.content:
name: ci
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: bundle exec rspec

class Report
  def self.pairs(rows)
    output = []
    rows.each do |left|
      rows.each do |right|
        output << [left, right]
      end
    end
    output
  end
end
